title: Happy Honeybee Cartoon Smiling Coloring Page

author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The honeyhoneybee is the only insect that produces food consumed by humans, acting as a critical agricultural pollinator.
Honeyhoneybees perform a specialized 'waggle dance' to show hive mates the direction and distance to rich flower patches.
